| `Ctrl+H` | Find & Replace |
| `Ctrl+G` | Go to Line |
| `Ctrl+Shift+F` | Format/pretty-print document |
| `Ctrl+Shift+M` | Minify (XML / JSON / EDI) |
| `Ctrl+T` | Close current tab |
| `Ctrl+Enter` | Execute XPath/JSONPath/YAMLPath expression |
| `Up/Down` | Cycle through query history (when focused in query box) |
| `Ctrl+Scroll` | Zoom editor (when mouse is over editor) or zoom right panel (when mouse is over right panel) |
| `F1` | Open Help window |

---

## Code Conventions

- File-scoped namespaces: `namespace PathFinder;`
- Nullable reference types enabled; use `?.` and `??` operators
- Private fields prefixed with `_` (e.g., `_tabDragStart`)
- Static syntax highlighting cached at class level per theme (`_xmlHighlightingDark`, `_xmlHighlightingLight`, `_jsonHighlightingDark`, `_jsonHighlightingLight`)
- Section separators in long files use `────` comment lines
- Services are pure static utility classes with no UI dependencies — keep them that way
- Tests use xUnit `[Fact]` and `[Theory]` attributes with documented line numbers in sample data
- `TestFiles/` is declared as `<Content CopyToOutputDirectory="PreserveNewest">` in the test `.csproj` so files are available at `AppContext.BaseDirectory/TestFiles/` at runtime
- Test helpers use `Path.Combine(AppContext.BaseDirectory, "TestFiles", filename)` — never hardcode absolute paths
- **Menu bar order:** the `Help` menu must always be the last (rightmost) top-level menu item in `MainWindow.xaml`
- **Disabled button styling pitfall:** WPF's default `Button` template uses a Chrome overlay that washes out custom `Background`/`Foreground` colors when `IsEnabled="False"`, making disabled buttons unreadable on dark themes. Any button that toggles `IsEnabled` must use a custom `ControlTemplate` (Border + ContentPresenter, no Chrome) with a `Trigger` on `IsEnabled=False` that sets `Background` to `{DynamicResource ActionButtonDisabled}` and `Foreground` to `{DynamicResource ActionButtonDisabledForeground}`. See the `DisableableButton` style in `ToolbarSettingsWindow.xaml` or the Delete button in `DcsaSettingsWindow.xaml` for the pattern.

---

## Test Coverage

### `WindowLayoutSettingsTests` (all `[Fact]`)
| Test | What it verifies |
|---|---|
| `SaveAndLoad_WithOpenFiles_RoundtripsFileList` | Saved `OpenFiles` list is restored identically after round-trip |
| `SaveAndLoad_WithNullOpenFiles_OpenFilesRemainsNull` | `null` `OpenFiles` serializes and deserializes as `null` |
| `SaveAndLoad_WithEmptyOpenFiles_OpenFilesIsEmpty` | Empty list round-trips without becoming `null` |
| `SaveAndLoad_PreservesWindowLayout` | All layout fields (position, size, panel width, maximised) survive round-trip |
| `LoadWindowSettings_FileNotFound_ReturnsNull` | Missing file → `null` (no exception) |
| `LoadWindowSettings_LegacyJsonWithoutOpenFiles_OpenFilesIsNull` | Old-format JSON (no `OpenFiles` key) loads without error; `OpenFiles` is `null` |
| `LoadWindowSettings_InvalidJson_ReturnsNull` | Corrupt JSON → `null` (no exception) |
| `WindowLayoutSettings_SerializedJson_IncludesOpenFilesProperty` | Serialized JSON contains `"OpenFiles"` key and path value |
| `SaveAndLoad_IsDarkModeTrue_RoundtripsCorrectly` | `IsDarkMode = true` survives save/load round-trip |
| `SaveAndLoad_IsDarkModeFalse_RoundtripsCorrectly` | `IsDarkMode = false` survives save/load round-trip |
| `LoadWindowSettings_LegacyJsonWithoutIsDarkMode_DefaultsToTrue` | Old-format JSON (no `IsDarkMode` key) loads with `IsDarkMode = true` default |
| `WindowLayoutSettings_SerializedJson_IncludesIsDarkModeProperty` | Serialized JSON contains `"IsDarkMode"` key |

### `EncodingServiceTests` (all `[Fact]`)
| Test | What it verifies |
|---|---|
| `DetectEncoding_Utf16LeBom_ReturnsUtf16Le` | `FF FE` BOM → UTF-16 LE BOM, bomLength=2 |
| `DetectEncoding_Utf16BeBom_ReturnsUtf16Be` | `FE FF` BOM → UTF-16 BE BOM, bomLength=2 |
| `DetectEncoding_Utf8Bom_ReturnsUtf8WithBomLength3` | `EF BB BF` BOM → UTF-8 BOM, bomLength=3 |
| `DetectEncoding_NoBom_ReturnsUtf8WithZeroBomLength` | No BOM → UTF-8, bomLength=0 |
| `DetectEncoding_EmptyBytes_ReturnsUtf8` | Empty byte array → UTF-8 |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_WithDoubleQuotes_UpdatesCorrectly` | `encoding="utf-16"` replaced with `encoding="utf-8"` |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_NoDeclaration_ReturnsUnchanged` | No XML declaration → text unchanged |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_AlreadyCorrectEncoding_ReturnsEquivalent` | Same encoding → text unchanged |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_CaseInsensitiveMatch` | `ENCODING="UTF-16"` matched case-insensitively |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_OnlyUpdatesFirstOccurrence` | Second `encoding=` attribute in content is not touched |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_WithSingleQuotes_UpdatesCorrectly` | `encoding='utf-16'` replaced with `encoding='utf-8'` using single quotes |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_WithSingleQuotes_PreservesQuoteStyle` | Single-quote style is preserved, not switched to double quotes |
| `UpdateXmlDeclarationEncoding_WhitespaceAroundEquals_UpdatesCorrectly` | `encoding = "utf-16"` with spaces around `=` is matched and updated |
| `WriteAndRead_Utf8_RoundtripsText` | Write UTF-8, read back, text and encoding detected correctly |
| `WriteAndRead_Utf16Le_WritesWithBomAndRoundtrips` | BOM `FF FE` present in output; round-trip text correct |
| `WriteAndRead_Utf16Be_WritesWithBomAndRoundtrips` | BOM `FE FF` present in output; round-trip text correct |
| `WriteFileWithEncoding_Xml_UpdatesDeclarationInFile` | Declaration updated from `utf-16` to `utf-8` in saved file |
| `SupportedEncodings_ContainsAllRequiredOptions` | All 4 required encoding names present; ANSI and ISO-8859-1 absent |
| `SupportedEncodings_HasCorrectXmlEncodingNames` | `XmlEncodingName` values correct for all 4 encodings |
| `ReadFileWithEncoding_XPathHighlightXml_DetectsUtf8NoBom` | Non-BOM file with `utf-16` declaration: declaration ignored, UTF-8 returned |
| `ReadFileWithEncoding_ExampleJson_DetectsUtf8` | `example.json` detected as UTF-8, content correct |
| `ReadFileWithEncoding_XmlDeclarationUtf8_NoBom_DetectsUtf8` | No-BOM file with `encoding="utf-8"` declaration → UTF-8 confirmed via declaration |
| `ReadFileWithEncoding_XmlDeclarationUtf16_NoBom_FallsBackToUtf8` | No-BOM file with `encoding="utf-16"` declaration (mismatch) → UTF-8 |

| `ExecuteXPath_NamespaceXml_NamespacedPathReturnsCorrectValue` | Explicit `ns0:` prefix XPath → correct preview value |
| `ExecuteXPath_NamespaceXml_NamespacedPathReturnsCorrectXPath` | Explicit `ns0:` prefix XPath → correct XPath in result |
| `ExecuteXPath_MultipleDefaultNamespacesXml_RootElementReturnsResult` | Unprefixed path on default-namespace doc → 1 result |
| `ExecuteXPath_MultipleDefaultNamespacesXml_FirstNamespaceLeafReturnsCorrectValue` | `Header/SenderID` in first default namespace → `"HYEDCNUAT"` |
| `ExecuteXPath_MultipleDefaultNamespacesXml_SecondNamespaceLeafReturnsCorrectValue` | `DataSource/DataProvider` in re-declared default namespace → `"HYEUATDCN"` |

| `ExecuteXPath_MultipleDefaultNamespacesXml_DataProviderLineNumber` | `DataProvider` element correctly mapped to line 12 |
| `ExecuteXPath_LeafElement_PreviewIsPlainText` | Leaf element Preview is plain inner text, not XML tags |
| `ExecuteXPath_EmptyElement_PreviewIsSelfClosingTag` | Empty element Preview is `"<TagName />"` |
| `ExecuteXPath_ParentElement_PreviewIsEllipsis` | Parent element Preview is `"{…}"` |
| `ExecuteXPath_LeafElementLongText_PreviewIsTruncatedAt80Chars` | Text >80 chars truncated with `…` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_MatchesExpectedXml` | Generated XML matches `AcknowledgementMessage.xml` (semantic comparison) |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_RootElementHasCorrectNamespace` | Root element namespace URI matches `targetNamespace` in XSD |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_RootElementNameIsCorrect` | Root element local name is `"AcknowledgementMessage"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_StringAttributeValueIsString` | `xs:string` attribute → `"String"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_DateTimeElementValueIsCorrect` | `xs:dateTime` element → `"2001-12-17T09:30:47Z"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_UnsignedByteAttributeIs255` | `xs:unsignedByte` attribute → `"255"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_UnsignedIntAttributeIs0` | `xs:unsignedInt` attribute → `"0"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_SchemaLocationPresentWhenFilenameProvided` | `xsi:schemaLocation` added when filename supplied |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_SchemaLocationAbsentWhenNoFilenameProvided` | No `xsi:schemaLocation` when filename omitted |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_SimpleContentTextAndAttributesBothPresent` | `simpleContent` element has both text content and attributes |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_MaxOccursUnboundedGeneratesOneInstance` | `maxOccurs="unbounded"` → exactly 1 sample instance |
| `GenerateSampleXml_AcknowledgementXsd_ProducesValidXml` | Generated output is parseable XML |
| `GenerateSampleXml_EmptyXsd_ThrowsInvalidOperationException` | XSD with no global elements → `InvalidOperationException` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_ProducesValidXml` | Large production XSD with self-referential types → parseable XML (regression: was StackOverflow before cycle-detection fix) |
| `GenerateSampleXml_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_RootElementIsUniversalShipment` | Root element local name is `"UniversalShipment"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_RootHasTargetNamespace` | Root element namespace URI matches `targetNamespace` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_ShipmentChildPresent` | `elementFormDefault="qualified"` → `Shipment` child is namespace-qualified |
| `GenerateSampleXml_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_SubShipmentDoesNotRecurseInfinitely` | `SubShipment(type=Shipment)` cycle → element **is written** (2nd visit = all children again); no nested `SubShipment` inside the 2nd-level `SubShipmentCollection`; no StackOverflow |
| `GenerateSampleXml_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_VersionAttributePresent` | Root `version` attribute (from `UniversalShipmentData`) → `"String"` |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_ValidXml_ReturnsEmptyList` | `AcknowledgementMessage.xml` (valid) against `AcknowledgementMessage.xsd` → empty list |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_InvalidXml_ReturnsErrors` | XML with unknown element against XSD → non-empty error list |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_InvalidXml_ErrorContainsLineNumber` | Error strings start with `"Line "` prefix |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_MalformedXsd_ThrowsException` | Malformed XSD content → throws exception |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_AcknowledgementXsd_ValidSampleXml_ReturnsEmptyList` | Generated sample XML from `AcknowledgementMessage.xsd` (no cycles) validates cleanly against that XSD |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_ValidSampleXml_ReturnsEmptyList` | Generated sample XML from `CarrierUniversalShipment.xsd` (has `SubShipment→Shipment` and `SubContext→Context` cycles) validates cleanly — cycle-skipped elements don't violate mandatory-child constraints |
| `ValidateXmlAgainstXsd_UnrelatedXml_ReturnsError` | XML whose root element/namespace doesn't match the XSD → non-empty error list (prevents silent lax-validation pass) |
| `GenerateSampleXml_PortOrderXsd_ProducesValidXml` | PortOrder XSD (no namespace, complexContent extension) → parseable XML |
| `GenerateSampleXml_PortOrderXsd_RootElementIsPortOrder` | Root element local name is `"PortOrder"` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_PortOrderXsd_HasTransactionChild` | `Transaction` child present — base type (`ExchangeType`) particle emitted via `ContentTypeParticle` |
| `GenerateSampleXml_PortOrderXsd_HasMessageChild` | `Message` child present — extension particle emitted correctly |
| `GenerateSampleXml_PortOrderXsd_TransactionHasChildElements` | `Transaction` has child elements (plain sequence type works correctly) |
| `GenerateSampleXml_PortOrderXsd_ValidatesAgainstItsOwnSchema` | Generated XML passes XSD validation — pattern facets (`\d{4}`, `[^ioOI]{1,17}`, `F-[A-J]`, etc.) produce valid values |
| `MinifyXml_FormattedXml_RemovesWhitespace` | Formatted XML → single line, shorter than original |
| `MinifyXml_FormattedXml_ProducesValidXml` | Minified XML is parseable by `XmlDocument` |
| `MinifyXml_FormattedXml_PreservesContent` | Minified XML still contains original values |
| `MinifyXml_MinifiedXml_IsIdempotent` | Minifying already-minified XML produces identical output |

| `FormatEdi_BadFormatFile_MatchesWellFormattedOutput` | Formatting the bad-format file produces the same result as formatting the well-formatted file |
| `FormatEdi_BadFormatFile_ContainsCorrectSegmentContent` | Each segment in the bad-format file matches the expected content after formatting |
| `ValidateEdi_ValidMessage_ReturnsNull` | Valid inline EDI → `null` (no error) |
| `ValidateEdi_WellFormattedFile_ReturnsNull` | `edifact.edi` → `null` |
| `ValidateEdi_BadFormatFile_ReturnsNull` | `edifactBadFormat.edi` → `null` (bad formatting is not a validation error) |
| `ValidateEdi_EmptyString_ReturnsError` | Empty input → error mentioning "empty" |
| `ValidateEdi_WhitespaceOnly_ReturnsError` | Whitespace-only → error mentioning "empty" |
| `ValidateEdi_NoSegmentTerminator_ReturnsErrorWithDescription` | No `'` → error mentioning "terminator" |
| `ValidateEdi_InvalidSegmentTag_LowercaseLetters_ReturnsError` | Lowercase tag → error mentioning "uppercase" |
| `ValidateEdi_InvalidSegmentTag_SingleChar_ReturnsError` | 1-char tag → error mentioning "too short" |
| `ValidateEdi_InvalidSegmentTag_FourChars_ReturnsError` | 4-char tag → error mentioning "too long" |
| `ValidateEdi_PlainText_ReturnsError` | Plain text → non-null error |
| `ValidateEdi_XmlContent_ReturnsError` | XML content → non-null error |
| `ValidateEdi_EscapedQuoteOnly_NoRealTerminator_ReturnsError` | `?'` only (no real terminator) → non-null error |
| `ValidateEdi_ErrorMessage_IncludesSegmentNumber` | Two segments, second invalid → error contains "Segment 2" |
| `ValidateEdi_EmptySegment_ReturnsError` | Bare `'` → error mentioning "empty segment" |
| `ValidateEdi_TrailingContent_ReturnsError` | Content after last `'` → error mentioning "Unexpected content" |
| `ValidateEdi_UnexpectedCharAfterTag_ReturnsError` | Digit after tag → error mentioning "unexpected character" |
| `ValidateEdi_LineWithoutTerminator_ReturnsError` | Line missing trailing `'` → error with line number |
| `ValidateEdi_AllLinesEndWithTerminator_ReturnsNull` | All lines end with `'` → `null` |
| `ValidateEdi_UntCountMismatch_ReturnsError` | UNT declares wrong segment count → error with actual vs declared counts |
| `ValidateEdi_UntReferenceNumberMismatch_ReturnsError` | UNT reference ≠ UNH reference → error with both values |
| `ValidateEdi_UntWithoutUnh_ReturnsError` | UNT without preceding UNH → error |
| `ValidateEdi_UnhWithoutUnt_ReturnsError` | UNH with no matching UNT → error |
| `ValidateEdi_NestedUnh_ReturnsError` | Two UNH without UNT between them → error |
| `ValidateEdi_ValidUnhUntPair_ReturnsNull` | Correct UNH/UNT pair (count & reference match) → `null` |
| `ValidateEdi_MultipleValidMessages_ReturnsNull` | Two consecutive valid UNH/UNT pairs → `null` |
| `ValidateEdi_NoUnhOrUnt_ReturnsNull` | Messages without UNH/UNT (envelope only) → `null` |
| `ValidateEdi_MultipleErrors_ReportsAll` | Both count and reference mismatch reported in a single multi-line error string |
| `MinifyEdi_FormattedEdi_RemovesLineBreaks` | Formatted EDI → single line, no `\n` or `\r` |
| `MinifyEdi_FormattedEdi_PreservesContent` | Minified EDI still contains original segment content |
| `MinifyEdi_MinifiedEdi_IsIdempotent` | Minifying already-minified EDI produces identical output |
| `MinifyEdi_EmptyString_ReturnsEmpty` | Empty input → empty output |
| `MinifyEdi_FormatRoundTrip_PreservesSegments` | Minify then format → 9 segment lines preserved |

### `EdifactDefinitionValidatorTests` (all `[Fact]`)
Tests marked † are skipped until `Build/ScrapeEdifactDefinitions.py` has been run and `Resources/EdifactDefinitions.json.gz` is embedded.

| Test | What it verifies |
|---|---|
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_EmptyInput_ReturnsEmptyList` | Empty input → empty error list (no crash) |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_WhitespaceOnlyInput_ReturnsEmptyList` | Whitespace-only → empty error list |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_ValidUna_NoUnaError` | "UNA:+.? '" (9 chars) → no UNA error produced |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_ShortUna_ReportsError` | "UNA:+.?'" (8 chars, body 7) → error mentioning "UNA" and "character" |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_MalformedUnh_ReportsMissingDirectory` | UNH with no message identifier composite → parse/directory error |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_ExistingTestFile_ReturnsNoStructuralErrors` † | `edifact.edi` → zero structural errors (unexpected/missing/exceeds-occurrence) |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_UnknownMessageType_ReturnsError` † | `FOOBAR:D:96A:UN` → error naming FOOBAR as unknown |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_UnknownDirectory_ReturnsError` † | `IFTMCS:D:ZZZ:UN` → directory DZZZ not-found error |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_MissingMandatoryBgm_ReportsError` † | IFTMCS D96A with DTM before BGM → BGM missing error |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_BgmExceedsMaxOccurrence_ReportsError` † | Two BGM segments when max is 1 → occurrence error |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_MultipleNadInGroups_NoStructuralError` † | Multiple NAD segments (SG11, C 99) → no structural error |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_RepeatedSegmentInGroup_NoStructuralError` † | Three consecutive FTX segments inside SG18 (max=9) → no "Unexpected segment" error |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_FtxExceedsMaxOccurrence_ReportsExceededNotUnexpected` † | Ten FTX in SG18 (max=9) → error says "exceeds its maximum occurrence count" not "Unexpected segment"; subsequent MEA is still accepted |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_FieldExceedsMaxLength_ReportsErrorWithLineNumber` † | UNH ref 20 chars (max 14) → length error with `"Line N:"` prefix |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_FieldError_HasLineNumberPrefix` † | Long UNH reference → every length error starts with `"Line N:"` |
| `ValidateEdiDefinition_MinimalAperak_NoStructuralError` † | Minimal APERAK D96A (UNH+BGM+UNT) → no structural error |

| `GetAllPaths_InvalidYaml_ReturnsEmptyList` | Malformed YAML → empty list |
| `ConvertYamlToJson_ValidYaml_ProducesValidJson` | YAML → parseable JSON |
| `ConvertYamlToJson_PreservesStringValue` | `store.name` → `"John"` in JSON |
| `ConvertYamlToJson_PreservesNumericValue` | `store.age` → `30` in JSON |
| `ConvertYamlToJson_PreservesArrayLength` | `store.books` array → 2 items in JSON |
| `ConvertJsonToYaml_ValidJson_ProducesValidYaml` | JSON object → YAML with `name: Alice` |
| `ConvertJsonToYaml_RoundTrip_PreservesData` | YAML→JSON→YAML→JSON round-trip produces `DeepEquals` tokens |
| `ConvertJsonToYaml_Array_ProducesSequence` | JSON array `[1,2,3]` → YAML `- 1`, `- 2`, `- 3` |

| Test | What it verifies |

| `ParseXsdSchema_AcknowledgementXsd_RootElementIsAcknowledgementMessage` | Root node name is `"AcknowledgementMessage"` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_AcknowledgementXsd_RootIsComplexType` | Root node `TypeKind` is `"complex"` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_AcknowledgementXsd_RootHasChildren` | Root node has non-empty `Children` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_AcknowledgementXsd_ContainsAttributes` | Attribute nodes (`IsAttribute = true`) present in root children |
| `ParseXsdSchema_AcknowledgementXsd_AttributeHasSimpleTypeKind` | Attribute node `TypeKind` is `"simple"` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_HandlesRecursiveTypes` | Self-referential XSD → no crash, returns non-empty list |
| `ParseXsdSchema_CarrierUniversalShipmentXsd_MarksRecursiveNodes` | At least one node in tree has `IsRecursive = true` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_PortOrderXsd_HandlesComplexContentExtension` | ComplexContent extension → root has children |
| `ParseXsdSchema_PortOrderXsd_ExtensionChildrenPresent` | Base type children present (Transaction from ExchangeType) |
| `ParseXsdSchema_ExampleXsd_ParsesWithoutError` | example.xsd → parses without exception |
| `ParseXsdSchema_EmptyInput_ThrowsInvalidOperationException` | Empty string → `InvalidOperationException` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_InvalidXml_ThrowsException` | Invalid XML → throws exception |
| `ParseXsdSchema_NoGlobalElements_ThrowsInvalidOperationException` | XSD with no global elements → `InvalidOperationException` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_ChoiceGroup_MarksChoiceChildren` | `xs:choice` children have `IsChoice = true` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_ChoiceGroup_ChoiceGroupIdIsSame` | All choice children share the same `ChoiceGroup` value |
| `ParseXsdSchema_Enumeration_ExtractsEnumValues` | `xs:enumeration` facets extracted into `Restrictions["enum"]` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_PatternFacet_ExtractsPattern` | `xs:pattern` facet extracted into `Restrictions["pattern"]` |
| `ParseXsdSchema_AnnotatedElement_ExtractsDocumentation` | `xs:annotation/xs:documentation` text extracted into `Documentation` |
| `GetStatistics_AcknowledgementXsd_ReturnsNonZeroCounts` | Statistics returns non-zero element and type counts |

### `JsonSchemaServiceTests` (all `[Fact]`)
| Test | What it verifies |
|---|---|
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_StandardSchema_ReturnsTrue` | JSON with `$schema` keyword → `true` |
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_OpenApiSpec_ReturnsTrue` | JSON with `openapi` keyword → `true` |
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_SchemaWithDefs_ReturnsTrue` | JSON with `$defs` → `true` |
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_PlainJson_ReturnsFalse` | Regular JSON data → `false` |
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_EmptyString_ReturnsFalse` | Empty string → `false` |
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_InvalidJson_ReturnsFalse` | Invalid JSON → `false` |
| `IsJsonSchemaContent_YamlOpenApi_ReturnsTrue` | YAML with `openapi` keyword → `true` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_SimpleObjectSchema_ReturnsOneRoot` | Object schema with properties → 1 root node |
| `ParseJsonSchema_SimpleObjectSchema_NameIsRequired` | Property in `required` array → `IsRequired = true` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_SimpleObjectSchema_AgeIsOptional` | Property not in `required` → `IsRequired = false` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_RefResolution_FollowsRef` | `$ref` to `$defs` → resolved, children present |
| `ParseJsonSchema_RecursiveRef_MarksRecursive` | Self-referencing `$ref` → `IsRecursive = true`, no crash |
| `ParseJsonSchema_ArrayType_HasArrayKind` | `"type": "array"` → `TypeKind` is `"array"` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_ArrayType_HasArrayItemChild` | Array with `items` → child with `IsArrayItem = true` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_OneOfChoice_MarksChoiceNodes` | `oneOf` → children have `IsChoice = true` with `ChoiceKeyword = "oneOf"` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_AllOfMerge_MergesProperties` | `allOf` → properties from all sub-schemas merged |
| `ParseJsonSchema_Restrictions_ExtractsEnumeration` | `enum` values extracted into `Restrictions["enum"]` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_OpenApiSpec_ParsesSchemasAsRoots` | OpenAPI spec → `components.schemas` entries as root nodes |
| `ParseJsonSchema_EmptyInput_ThrowsInvalidOperationException` | Empty string → `InvalidOperationException` |
| `ParseJsonSchema_Description_ExtractsDocumentation` | `description` field → `Documentation` property set |
| `GetStatistics_SimpleSchema_ReturnsNonZeroCounts` | Statistics returns non-zero property and object counts |

| `GenerateSampleJson_SimpleSchema_ProducesNonEmptyJson` | Simple JSON Schema → non-empty sample JSON |
| `GenerateSampleJson_SimpleSchema_ProducesValidJson` | Generated sample JSON is parseable by `JToken.Parse` |
| `GenerateSampleJson_SimpleSchema_ContainsExpectedKeys` | Generated sample contains all schema property names |
| `GenerateSampleJson_WithEnum_UsesFirstEnumValue` | `enum: ["red", "green", "blue"]` → sample uses `"red"` |
| `GenerateSampleJson_WithArray_ProducesArray` | `type: array` → sample contains `[` and `"String"` |
| `GenerateSampleJson_WithRef_ResolvesReference` | `$ref` to `$defs/Address` → sample contains `street` and `city` |
| `GenerateSampleJson_DateTimeFormat_ProducesDateTimeString` | `format: date-time` → sample contains `"2001-12-17T09:30:47Z"` |
| `GenerateSampleJson_EmptyInput_ThrowsInvalidOperationException` | Empty input → `InvalidOperationException` |
